rationale: 5d2f9381 mandates an always-on EOD scheduler, which rules out Local-only (not always-on) and makes a serverless-first platform like Vercel a poor fit for persistent background jobs. 2aa23484 establishes this is a single-household personal app, favouring a cheap, low-overhead single platform over a multi-service stack. The decision context further records that the user explicitly rejected Vercel+Neon as over-engineered and expensive, and named Railway as the preferred single-platform solution — consistent with both binding priors.
